'''thokafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nsfw|nsfw]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nsfw|nsfw]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thokafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thokafithi|thokafithi]] || [[word:thokafiji|thokafiji]] || [[word:thokafishi|thokafishi]] || [[word:thokafiki|thokafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thokafuthuthu|thokafuthuthu]] || [[word:thokafujuju|thokafujuju]] || [[word:thokafushushu|thokafushushu]] || [[word:thokafukuku|thokafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokafuthu|thokafuthu]] || [[word:thokafuju|thokafuju]] || [[word:thokafushu|thokafushu]] || [[word:thokafuku|thokafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokafufthuf|thokafufthuf]] || [[word:thokafufjuf|thokafufjuf]] || [[word:thokafufshuf|thokafufshuf]] || [[word:thokafufkuf|thokafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thokafethe|thokafethe]] || [[word:thokafeje|thokafeje]] || [[word:thokafeshe|thokafeshe]] || [[word:thokafeke|thokafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thokafothotho|thokafothotho]] || [[word:thokafojojo|thokafojojo]] || [[word:thokafoshosho|thokafoshosho]] || [[word:thokafokoko|thokafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokafotho|thokafotho]] || [[word:thokafojo|thokafojo]] || [[word:thokafosho|thokafosho]] || [[word:thokafoko|thokafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokafofthof|thokafofthof]] || [[word:thokafofjof|thokafofjof]] || [[word:thokafofshof|thokafofshof]] || [[word:thokafofkof|thokafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thokafĂŻfthĂŻf|thokafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thokafĂŻfjĂŻf|thokafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thokafĂŻfshĂŻf|thokafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thokafĂŻfkĂŻf|thokafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thokafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thokafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thokafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thokafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thokafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thokafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thokafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thokafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokafĂŻfthĂŻf|thokafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thokafĂŻfjĂŻf|thokafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thokafĂŻfshĂŻf|thokafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thokafĂŻfkĂŻf|thokafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokafĂŻfthĂŻf|thokafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thokafĂŻfjĂŻf|thokafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thokafĂŻfshĂŻf|thokafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thokafĂŻfkĂŻf|thokafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thokafĂŠthĂŠ|thokafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thokafĂŠjĂŠ|thokafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thokafĂŠshĂŠ|thokafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thokafĂŠkĂŠ|thokafĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thokafathatha|thokafathatha]] || [[word:thokafajaja|thokafajaja]] || [[word:thokafashasha|thokafashasha]] || [[word:thokafakaka|thokafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokafatha|thokafatha]] || [[word:thokafaja|thokafaja]] || [[word:thokafasha|thokafasha]] || [[word:thokafaka|thokafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokafafthaf|thokafafthaf]] || [[word:thokafafjaf|thokafafjaf]] || [[word:thokafafshaf|thokafafshaf]] || [[word:thokafafkaf|thokafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thokafasha|thokafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thokafshĂ«sha|thokafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thokafrosha|thokafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thokafmusha|thokafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thokafyasha|thokafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothokafnkshĂ«sha|gothokafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothokafnkrosha|gothokafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothokafnkmusha|gothokafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothokafnkyasha|gothokafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thokakafasha|thokakafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thokakafshĂ«sha|thokakafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thokakafrosha|thokakafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thokakafmusha|thokakafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thokakafyasha|thokakafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothokakafnkshĂ«sha|gothokakafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothokakafnkrosha|gothokakafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothokakafnkmusha|gothokakafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothokakafnkyasha|gothokakafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thekĂŠfasha|thekĂŠfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thekĂŠfshĂ«sha|thekĂŠfshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thekĂŠfrosha|thekĂŠfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thekĂŠfmusha|thekĂŠfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thekĂŠfyasha|thekĂŠfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothekĂŠfnkshĂ«sha|gothekĂŠfnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothekĂŠfnkrosha|gothekĂŠfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothekĂŠfnkmusha|gothekĂŠfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothekĂŠfnkyasha|gothekĂŠfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thokfafasha|thokfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thokfafshĂ«sha|thokfafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thokfafrosha|thokfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thokfafmusha|thokfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thokfafyasha|thokfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothokfafnkshĂ«sha|gothokfafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothokfafnkrosha|gothokfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothokfafnkmusha|gothokfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothokfafnkyasha|gothokfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
